---
title: "Presentations"
page-layout: full
css: files/publications/pub-listing.css
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
#| warning: false

library(yaml)

## Helper to format date
fmt_date <- function(d) {
  format(as.Date(d), "%B %d, %Y")
}

## Helper to get most recent event date for a presentation
latest_event_date <- function(p) {
  dates <- as.Date(vapply(p$events, function(ev) ev$date, character(1)))
  max(dates, na.rm = TRUE)
}

## Read in presentations
pres <- yaml::read_yaml("files/presentations/presentations.yml")

## Sort by most recent
pres <- pres[order(vapply(pres, latest_event_date, as.Date("1900-01-01")), decreasing = TRUE)]

## Separate into Talks and Posters
talks <- Filter(function(p) !("poster" %in% p$categories), pres)
posters <- Filter(function(p) "poster" %in% p$categories, pres)

```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
#| warning: false

for (p in talks) {

  cat("<div class='presentation-item'>\n")

  ## Title + type
  cat(sprintf("<h3 class='pres-title'>%s</h3>\n", p$title))
  types <- p$type
  if (!is.null(types) && !is.vector(types)) {
    types <- as.vector(types)
  }
  type_str <- paste(types, collapse = ", ")
  cat(sprintf("<p class='pres-type'><em>%s</em></p>\n", type_str))

  ## Events list
  cat("<ul class='pres-events'>\n")
  for (ev in p$events) {
    cat("<li>")
    cat(sprintf("<strong>%s</strong>, %s — %s",
                ev$event,
                ev$location,
                fmt_date(ev$date)))
    cat("</li>\n")
  }
  cat("</ul>\n")

  ## Buttons (Slides, Video, Code, PDF)
  cat("<p class='pres-links'>\n")

  if (!is.null(p$slides)) {
    cat(sprintf(
      "<a href='%s' class='pub-btn btn-pdf' target='_blank' rel='noopener'>
         <i class='bi bi-file-earmark-pdf'></i> Slides
       </a> ",
      p$slides
    ))
  }

  if (!is.null(p$code)) {
    cat(sprintf(
      "<a href='%s' class='pub-btn btn-github' target='_blank' rel='noopener'>
         <i class='bi bi-github'></i> Code
       </a> ",
      p$code
    ))
  }

  if (!is.null(p$pdf)) {
    cat(sprintf(
      "<a href='%s' class='pub-btn btn-pdf' target='_blank' rel='noopener'>
         <i class='bi bi-file-earmark-pdf'></i> PDF
       </a> ",
      p$pdf
    ))
  }

  if (!is.null(p$paper)) {
    cat(sprintf(
      "<a href='%s' class='pub-btn btn-preprint' target='_blank' rel='noopener'>
         <i class='bi bi-journal-text'></i> Paper
       </a> ",
      p$paper
    ))
  }

  cat("</p>\n")

  cat("<hr class='pub-divider'>\n")
  cat("</div>\n\n")
}
```

## Posters

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
#| warning: false

for (p in posters) {

  cat("<div class='presentation-item'>\n")

  ## Title + type
  cat(sprintf("<h3 class='pres-title'>%s</h3>\n", p$title))
  types <- p$type
  if (!is.null(types) && !is.vector(types)) {
    types <- as.vector(types)
  }
  type_str <- paste(types, collapse = ", ")
  cat(sprintf("<p class='pres-type'><em>%s</em></p>\n", type_str))

  ## Events list
  cat("<ul class='pres-events'>\n")
  for (ev in p$events) {
    cat("<li>")
    cat(sprintf("<strong>%s</strong>, %s — %s",
                ev$event,
                ev$location,
                fmt_date(ev$date)))
    cat("</li>\n")
  }
  cat("</ul>\n")

  ## Buttons (Slides, Video, Code, PDF)
  cat("<p class='pres-links'>\n")

  if (!is.null(p$slides)) {
    cat(sprintf(
      "<a href='%s' class='pub-btn btn-pdf' target='_blank' rel='noopener'>
         <i class='bi bi-file-earmark-pdf'></i> Slides
       </a> ",
      p$slides
    ))
  }

  if (!is.null(p$code)) {
    cat(sprintf(
      "<a href='%s' class='pub-btn btn-github' target='_blank' rel='noopener'>
         <i class='bi bi-github'></i> Code
       </a> ",
      p$code
    ))
  }

  if (!is.null(p$pdf)) {
    cat(sprintf(
      "<a href='%s' class='pub-btn btn-pdf' target='_blank' rel='noopener'>
         <i class='bi bi-file-earmark-pdf'></i> PDF
       </a> ",
      p$pdf
    ))
  }

  if (!is.null(p$paper)) {
    cat(sprintf(
      "<a href='%s' class='pub-btn btn-preprint' target='_blank' rel='noopener'>
         <i class='bi bi-journal-text'></i> Paper
       </a> ",
      p$paper
    ))
  }

  cat("</p>\n")

  cat("<hr class='pub-divider'>\n")
  cat("</div>\n\n")
}
```
